events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. It is measurement check production welding. Observed field condition: fillet gauge fail (ME). Work rough-complete. Need estimate/interpret measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. We need decide fail because fillet weld size does not meet specified leg length/throat per AWS D1.1/D1.3 and WPS. Risk high? Welding undersize fillet can reduce strength, fatigue, structural integrity. In industrial site, high. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 85 rough-complete. value? Could represent fillet size deficiency, but no numeric given. Maybe value 0 because not asked numeric reading? But task asks estimate measurable condition. We can set value to e.g. estimated undersize by fillet gauge. Since no exact measurement, maybe value 0 (unknown). But better include a representative? The schema says use value for numeric reading or computed quantity when task asks for one. It says estimate or interpret measurable condition. We can set value to 0 with explanation that fillet gauge reading indicates non-conformance. Or maybe value should be the measured fillet size? Not provided. Could set value: 0 (gauge fail). Hmm.

Need output exactly one valid JSON object, no prose. Need write to /app/answer.json. As ChatGPT, we can provide JSON in response; the system says return exactly one valid JSON object matching requested answer schema. So final should be just JSON. Need ensure fields present. Let's craft.

Decision: fail. Risk: high. work_stage: rough-complete. component_conditions: ["installed-defective","non-compliant"]. percent_complete: 85. value: 0 (fillet gauge failed; actual leg/throat below specified minimum). sound_source: ""? Since not audio. event_time:0, rate:0, order: [], workable: []. findings: ["Fillet weld leg length/throat dimension does not pass the fillet weld gauge check","Undersize fillet weld below WPS/AWS D1.1/D1.3 minimum size"]. actions: ["Reject weld and mark for repair/rework","Re-weld to specified fillet size and re-inspect with fillet gauge","Verify WPS parameters and fit-up before rework"]. rationale: "A fillet gauge fail indicates the weld throat/leg is smaller than the specified minimum fillet size, violating AWS D1.1/D1.3 acceptance criteria and the shop WPS; an undersize fillet cannot carry the design load and is structurally defective." references: ["AWS D1.1/D1.3 fillet weld size acceptance criteria","shop WPS specified fillet size"]. confidence: 0.9.

Need ensure JSON valid. No trailing commas. Use strings. Let's produce.

  "findings": [
    "Fillet weld leg length/throat dimension does not pass the fillet weld gauge check",
    "Undersize fillet weld below the minimum specified size"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the weld and mark it for repair/rework",
    "Re-weld to the specified fillet size per the shop WPS",
    "Re-inspect with a fillet weld gauge after rework"
  ],
  "rationale": "A fillet gauge fail indicates the measured weld throat or leg length is less than the specified minimum fillet size, violating AWS D1.1/D1.3 acceptance criteria and the shop WPS. An undersize fillet cannot reliably carry the design load and is structurally defective.",
  "references": [
    "AWS D1.1/D1.3 fillet weld size acceptance criteria",
    "shop WPS specified fillet size"
  ]
